policy.originalTierRule: Unity tiers are independent precomposed PNGs (112/130/156/196/262/392), not exact crops.

smallSymbolStrategy.fallback: uniform scale of tallest canonical sprite into cell
smallSymbolStrategy.note: Never create 6 SymbolEntry per logical id. Board picks SpriteFrame by column occupancy.

winFx.note: Unity 高亮/消除特效逐像素还原已放弃（多层发光 + 湍流 shader + ParticleSystem，静态贴图无法复现）。运行时用 scripts/editor-app/PlaceholderFx.ts 占位。

shared.note: borderless letter layer for dissolve/glow overlays
